docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER TEMPLE EMANU-EL HEARING SET FOR JAN-26-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER TEMPLE EMANU-EL AS TO RESPONDENT MARYASOV, SAM JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-26-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE KAHN DISCLOSED HIS CONNECTION AND ALSO HIS COLLEAGUE'S CONNECTION AND SISTER IN LAW WHO IS A MEMBER OF THE BOARD OF TEMPLE EMANUEL. HE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER TEMPLE EMANU-EL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077
